overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a medieval fantasy game showing a player character in armor carrying a torch through a dark village at night. The character navigates narrow paths beside stone walls and wooden fences before emerging into a village square populated by NPCs carrying lanterns.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path beside a tall stone wall, holding a torch to light the way

entered.detail: tall stone wall running along the right side of the path
wooden picket fence atop the stone wall
medieval wooden house with thatched roof visible across open ground
unpaved dirt trail with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path beside a tall stone wall topped with wooden fencing. The scene is dark and enclosed, illuminated primarily by the character's torch, with wooden buildings visible in the distance to the left.

events.description: character turns left at the corner of the stone wall
encountering NPC villagers carrying lanterns and torches

agents.ego_description: turning left around the stone wall corner and proceeding into the village street

notable_agents.action: villager carrying a lantern walking toward the camera
villager walking in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: large wooden gate entrance to the village interior
wider dirt street lined with wooden houses

segments.scene_description: The character turns left around the corner, revealing a wooden gate structure ahead. The stone wall shifts from the right to the left side of the frame. NPC villagers carrying lanterns appear, walking through the village street as the path widens.

events.description: entering open village square from narrow street

agents.ego_description: walking through the village square passing multiple NPCs with torches

notable_agents.action: villager with torch walking across the square
group of villagers gathered near a building entrance

entered.detail: open central area of the village surrounded by buildings

segments.scene_description: The character enters a more open village square surrounded by wooden buildings. Multiple NPCs are visible carrying torches and lanterns, moving about the area. The stone wall and gate structure fall behind as the character proceeds through the center of the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, enclosed alleyway that gradually opens into a bustling village square. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path beside a tall stone wall and wooden fencing, with the scene illuminated primarily by the glow of a handheld torch. As the character turns left around a corner, the stone wall shifts to the left and the path widens to reveal a wooden gate and the first few villagers carrying lanterns. The scene then expands into an open square surrounded by wooden buildings, where the lighting becomes more diffuse as multiple NPCs with torches and lanterns move throughout the area. Finally, the stone wall and gate fall behind as the camera proceeds deep into the center of the settlement.
